findings.title: GA4 tag is present but GA4 current-window users are still zero while PostHog has traffic.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the site visible, then recheck GA4 after data latency; if it remains zero, inspect ad blockers, consent, and duplicate static analytics.

findings.title: Traffic exists but no allowlisted decision event was captured.
findings.recommended_action: Instrument one primary owner decision event for this site before optimizing conversion.

findings.title: Search Console data is delayed by design and should not be read as live traffic.
findings.recommended_action: Use GSC for search demand/opportunity, not same-day live decisions.
